subgoals.description: Research and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh
subgoals.success_criterion: List of 3-5 venues with names and locations

subgoals.description: Gather detailed information (capacity, pricing, amenities) for each venue on the list
subgoals.success_criterion: Detailed data collected for all venues in the list

subgoals.description: Draft a professional flyer using the gathered venue details
subgoals.success_criterion: Flyer text completed with all necessary information
